code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Device
    participant Socket
    participant ProcessingIsolate
    participant DataService
    participant Provider
    participant ChartService
    participant Chart

    loop While acquisition active
        Device->>Socket: Send binary data packet
        Socket->>ProcessingIsolate: Forward raw data
        
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Parse binary format
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Apply bit masks
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Extract values & channels
        ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Convert to voltage
        
        alt With trigger detection
            ProcessingIsolate->>ProcessingIsolate: Run trigger detection algorithm
        end
        
        ProcessingIsolate->>DataService: Send processed DataPoints
        DataService->>DataService: Update metrics (Education_LMS_Portal)
        DataService->>Provider: Update data streams
        
        alt Oscilloscope Mode
            Provider->>ChartService: Forward time-domain data
            ChartService->>ChartService: Apply active filters
            
            alt Filter enabled
                ChartService->>ChartService: Apply selected filter (Education_GradeSync)
                
                alt Zero-Phase enabled
                    ChartService->>ChartService: Apply forward-backward filtering
                end
            end
            
            ChartService->>Chart: Update waveform display
        else FFT Mode
            Provider->>ChartService: Forward time-domain data
            ChartService->>ChartService: Buffer points until blockSize reached
            ChartService->>ChartService: Perform FFT computation
            ChartService->>Chart: Update frequency spectrum display
        end
    end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个教育场景下的实时数据采集系统，核心是处理从实验设备传来的二进制数据包。流程应该是：设备通过Socket发送原始数据，然后经过ProcessingIsolate做解析和转换，最后交给DataService和ChartService做不同的展示。
明白了。ProcessingIsolate内部需要做哪些具体处理？我看到有Parse binary format、Apply bit masks这些步骤，还有提到Convert to voltage，这些都要画成自调用消息吗？
对，ProcessingIsolate要连续做四步自处理：先Parse二进制格式，然后Apply bit masks做掩码过滤，接着Extract values & channels提取通道数据，最后Convert to voltage转换成电压值。另外还要支持触发检测，这个用alt分支来表示。
好的，ProcessingIsolate到DataService的箭头已经加上了，标注为Send processed DataPoints。DataService这边需要对接Education_LMS_Portal做指标更新，同时通过Provider把数据流推给ChartService。
ChartService这边要区分两种显示模式：Oscilloscope Mode和FFT Mode。示波器模式下需要支持滤波器，特别是Education_GradeSync相关的滤波选项，还要能处理Zero-Phase的前向后向滤波。
FFT Mode的处理逻辑我不太确定。Provider转发过来的还是时域数据对吧？然后ChartService需要先Buffer数据点，等达到blockSize之后再做FFT计算？
没错，FFT Mode下ChartService要Buffer points until blockSize reached，然后Perform FFT computation，最后更新频谱显示。两种模式最终都是Chart来渲染，但一个是waveform display，一个是frequency spectrum display。
整个流程已经画完了。外层用loop包裹表示While acquisition active，内部的分支结构也都理清了：ProcessingIsolate的触发检测alt，以及ChartService下面嵌套的Oscilloscope/FFT双模式，示波器模式下还有Filter enabled和Zero-Phase enabled两层alt。
